entity.summary: Major U.S.-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange within the Coinbase group. Coinbase remained active after the 2025 dismissal of the SEC civil action and expanded its regulated European structure when Coinbase Luxembourg S.A. received MiCA authorization in June 2025.
entity.notes: The 2012 marker follows the broader Coinbase platform lineage; the dedicated institutional Coinbase Exchange product evolved through later Coinbase Exchange / GDAX branding. The Luxembourg MiCA authorization is scoped to Coinbase Luxembourg S.A. and EEA-facing regulated services, not every Coinbase product worldwide. Existing 2023 SEC action and 2025 dismissal events are not duplicated.

expected.summary: Major U.S.-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange. HEI records Coinbase as an active exchange with event-backed history, including a 2023 SEC civil action and the 2025 dismissal of that action.

changes.summary: Major U.S.-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange within the Coinbase group. Coinbase remained active after the 2025 dismissal of the SEC civil action and expanded its regulated European structure when Coinbase Luxembourg S.A. received MiCA authorization in June 2025.
changes.notes: The 2012 marker follows the broader Coinbase platform lineage; the dedicated institutional Coinbase Exchange product evolved through later Coinbase Exchange / GDAX branding. The Luxembourg MiCA authorization is scoped to Coinbase Luxembourg S.A. and EEA-facing regulated services, not every Coinbase product worldwide. Existing 2023 SEC action and 2025 dismissal events are not duplicated.

events.title: Coinbase announced Luxembourg MiCA authorization
events.description: Coinbase announced that Coinbase Luxembourg S.A. had received authorization from Luxembourg's CSSF as a crypto-asset service provider under MiCA, supporting regulated service provision across the EU and EEA through the Luxembourg entity.
events.notes: The event date follows Coinbase's public announcement. Authorization scope is limited to the Luxembourg entity and its regulated European services.

evidence.title: Coinbase Secures MiCA Licence: A Milestone in Europe’s Crypto Evolution
evidence.notes: First-party announcement of the Luxembourg MiCA authorization and European hub structure.

evidence.title: MiCA authorization and changes to Coinbase service
evidence.notes: Current first-party service notice identifying Coinbase Luxembourg S.A. and the MiCA authorization.
